description.zh-Hans: 从精灵表图像网格中提取单个单元格/帧。将输入图像分割为列x行，并在指定帧索引处选择单元格（行主序）。
description.en: Extracts a single cell/frame from a sprite sheet image grid. Divides the input image into cols x rows and selects the cell at 帧索引 (row-major order).

triggers.zh-Hans: 精灵切片, 精灵提取, 帧提取, 精灵裁剪
triggers.en: sprite slice, sprite extract, frame extract, sprite crop

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 从精灵表中提取指定帧索引的单个图像单元。
exampleUsage.en: Extract a single image cell at a specified frame index from a sprite sheet.
